summary: Iteration 53 - Commission Tracking Feature Testing Complete. All backend tests passed (15/15). Frontend UI verified - Commission column visible in Daily Projection table, commission input in OnboardingWizard at final step, and commission input in TradeMonitorPage actual profit dialog.
critical_code_review_comments: Commission tracking feature is properly implemented across all components
Backend /api/trade/log endpoint correctly accepts and stores commission field
Frontend Daily Projection table shows Commission column with proper headers
OnboardingWizard has total commission input at final step (step 5)
TradeMonitorPage has commission input in actual profit dialog
context_for_next_testing_agent: Commission tracking feature fully implemented and tested. Backend APIs accept commission field in trade logs and total_commission in onboarding. Frontend shows Commission column in Daily Projection table (visible via Monthly Table > History > Daily View). Commission input appears in OnboardingWizard at final step and in TradeMonitorPage actual profit dialog.
